testCases.notes: Purchasing group has 6 items (Dashboard, Orders, Lists, Quote requests, Saved for later, Back-in-stock list); all 4 expected items (Dashboard, Orders, Lists, Saved for Later) present. Sidebar also shows Marketing, Corporate, User groups for B2B user.

Personal account (Mila milamuller2024@yahoo.com) sees all 4 expected User group items: Profile, Addresses, Change password, Saved credit cards. Confirms 'Addresses' link visible only for personal accounts (BL — hidden for B2B). Personal account has NO Corporate group (no org membership).
Group headers (Purchasing, Marketing, Corporate, User) are DIV/SPAN with no href, cursor:auto. No navigation occurs on click.

All visible nav items routed correctly. Dashboard /account/dashboard, Orders /account/orders, Lists /account/lists, Saved for later /account/saved-for-later, Profile /account/profile, Change password /account/change-password, Saved credit cards /account/saved-credit-cards. Addresses link hidden for B2B per BL — direct URL /account/addresses redirects to /account/dashboard.

Active state highlighting: aria-current='page', font-weight:700, bgColor:rgb(223,228,231), class vc-menu-item__inner--active. After clicking Profile only Profile is active (count=1). Only one item active at a time.

testCases.title: Account Menu - Mobile Responsive Layout
testCases.notes: FUNCTIONAL parts PASS: mobile drawer opens via hamburger, group structure (Purchasing, Marketing, Corporate, User) maintained, Purchasing expansion shows all sub-items (Orders, Lists, Quote requests, Saved for later, Back-in-stock list), tap Orders navigates to /account/orders correctly. TOUCH TARGET FAIL: Group toggle buttons and account links measure 40px height (40x288 px) — below WCAG 2.5.5 / iOS 44x44px minimum. Logout button is 25x62 px. This is a platform-wide mobile menu pattern, not Account-menu-specific.

Members page loads, table shows 4 active members (Emily Johnson Org maintainer, slot2 invite Inactive, David Kim Purchasing agent, John Mitchell Org maintainer) with Name/Role/Email/Active columns. Own account (John Mitchell) visible. Roles use storefront vocab (Organization maintainer/employee/Purchasing agent) — column structure matches assertion.

Invite Member with Buyer-equivalent role: invite+buyer+1778003837100@example.com, role 'Organization employee' (default). Toast 'The invite has been successfully sent' shown. New row appears with Invited status. Member count 4→5. Cleaned up at end.

Invite Member with Admin-equivalent role: invite+admin+1778003900000@example.com, role 'Organization maintainer'. Toast shown, row appears with Invited status. Member count 5→6. New admin permission verification skipped (requires invite acceptance flow). Cleaned up at end.

Edit Member Role: David Kim from 'Purchasing agent' to 'Organization maintainer'. Change role dialog with radio options. Save persisted in member list immediately. Reverted back to Purchasing agent for subsequent block test.

Block Member: David Kim. Confirmation dialog 'Are you sure you want to block access of the user?' shown with Cancel/OK. After OK, status changed Active→Blocked. Action menu toggled Block→Unblock. Login validation skipped (no password for David Kim in test data).
Unblock Member: David Kim. Confirmation dialog shown. After OK, status returned Blocked→Active. Action menu toggled Unblock→Block. State fully restored.

Filter Members by Role: Filters panel shows 5 role checkboxes (Organization maintainer, Organization employee, Purchasing agent, Store administrator, Store manager) and 3 status checkboxes (Active, Invited, Blocked). Filter 'Purchasing agent' → 1 result (David Kim). Reset filters chip restores all 6 results.
Search Members: input has placeholder 'Search by name, role or email'. Type 'David' + Enter → 1 result (David Kim). Clear search + Enter → 6 results restored.

bugs.title: Mobile account menu touch targets are 40px tall, below WCAG 2.5.5 / iOS 44x44px minimum
bugs.stepsToReproduce: 1. Set viewport to 375x667. 2. Login as B2B user (test-john.mitchell-20260310@test-agent.com / TestPass123!). 3. Navigate to https://vcst-qa-storefront.govirto.com/account/dashboard. 4. Click hamburger (Main menu button). 5. Inspect any account section group toggle (Purchasing/Marketing/Corporate/User) or sub-link (Dashboard/Orders/Lists/Saved for later/Back-in-stock list). Measure bounding box height.
bugs.expected: Touch targets >= 44x44px (WCAG 2.5.5 Target Size, iOS HIG)
bugs.actual: Group toggle buttons and account links measure 40x288 px (height 40px). Logout button measures 25x62 px. Top-level header buttons (close drawer) at 38x38 px also fail.
